Dominate Mindset

Built For The Busy.
The Relentless.

No toxic gym culture. No gatekeeping. Just tools, knowledge and community to become your strongest self.

Our Story
From Zero Time
To Real Results.

I started Gains Dom because I had no time for the gym. Two jobs. A family. Zero excuses. Just results.

What started as a personal quest became a community of over 1,000 busy people who refuse to let a tight schedule kill their fitness goals. Every product I recommend I've tested myself. Every routine I share I've done in my own living room.

Join Us On TikTok ↗
Core Values
What We Stand For
🔁
Consistency Over Perfection
Showing up imperfectly every day beats the perfect workout you never do.
🏠
Your Home Is Your Gym
Four walls and the will to work is all the gym you'll ever need.
📈
Small Steps. Big Gains.
1% better every day. The people who dominate never rush — they stack wins.

Affiliate Disclosure

Gains Dom participates in the AliExpress affiliate programme. This means that when you click on a product link on our site and complete a purchase, we may receive a small commission — at absolutely no additional cost to you. The price you pay is identical whether you use our link or navigate to AliExpress directly.

This commission is what allows us to keep this platform free, continue curating and testing products, and invest in creating the home workout content our community relies on. We only recommend products we genuinely believe in — our editorial decisions are never influenced by commission rates.

✅
Our promise: Every product featured on Gains Dom is selected for its quality and results — not its affiliate value. Your trust is our most important asset.

FAQ
Quick Answers
What kind of products do you sell? +
We sell premium home workout products — from resistance gear to recovery tools — everything you need to build real gains from the comfort of your home. No gym membership required.
How long until I see results? +
Most people notice visible changes within 3–4 weeks of daily 15-minute sessions. Dramatic transformations happen around 8–12 weeks.
Are these products safe? +
Yes. Every product we recommend is EMS certified and independently reviewed. We only feature products we genuinely believe in.
Where do products ship from? +
All products are sourced from AliExpress sellers. Shipping times vary by seller — typically 7–20 days. Check each product listing for details.
Do you earn commission from product links? +
Yes — we use affiliate links and may earn a small commission if you purchase through our links. This costs you nothing extra and keeps the site running. We only recommend products we believe in.
⚡ Gains Dom Admin
